case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. GEORGE PAPAFILIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAPAFILIS, GEORGE EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT LOUKOPOULOS, AGATHA EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PAPAFILIS, GEORGE EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT LOUKOPOULOS, AGATHA EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
